final:
// // This module toggles the output on each clock cycle regardless of the enable signal
module crystal_oscillator (
    input wire clk,
    input wire enable,
    output reg out
);
    initial begin
        out = 0; // Initial state
    end
    
    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (enable) begin
            out <= ~out; // Toggle output
        end
    end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module toggles the output on each clock cycle regardless of the enable signal
